name: McLaren
philosophy: McLaren's web presence is hypercar-racing chrome — McLaren Orange (#ff8000) as the chromatic anchor, dark cinematic photography (often in racing-circuit lighting), and a layout grammar that reads as Formula 1 mission control. The atmosphere is racing-engineered: every page references aerodynamic precision, lap times, and engineering provenance.

design_language.motion_signature: Racing-grade motion — auto-playing engineering-cinematic video heroes, slow ken-burns pans on still imagery (10-second cycles), hover lift on vehicle cards with a hard 200ms scale (1.04). Configurator changes use a hard cut at 150ms — racing-precision, no spring.

trademark_signals: McLaren Orange (#ff8000) — the brand's chromatic voltage, drawn from the F1 racing program
Dark cinematic canvas (#0a0a0a) with full-bleed hypercar photography
F1-racing aesthetic chrome — telemetry-style numerical readouts, lap-time-style tabular figures
Carbon-fiber and racing-livery texture as occasional surface accent
ai_slop_avoided: Don't tint McLaren Orange — the specific saturated #ff8000 is brand
Don't replace dark cinematic canvas with white — hypercar photography demands dark backdrop
Don't soften card radii above 4px — racing engineering precision
Don't sanitize the F1-mission-control aesthetic — it is the brand
